executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Act as a UX QA-auditor. Ensure to verify: 1. First impression (clarity of value proposition). 2. Onboarding (logical path, no extra steps). 3. Navigation (no dead ends). 4. Main user flow (open site, register/login, start practice, complete task, get result). 5. Mobile UX (use mobile viewport emulation if possible to check readability, button sizes, spacing, contrast). 6. UI clarity (visual hierarchy, empty/loading/error states). 7. Retention UX (progress feeling, motivation). 8. Accessibility (keyboard navigation, focus states). In your final AI markdown report, format findings with Severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), Page, User flow step, Problem, Why it hurts UX, How to fix, Suggested UI/UX improvement. Include top 5 UX problems, top 5 quick wins, what to fix first, retention improvements, and manual checks.
